Alger Wilson.build: Extremely muscular arms with illusory fish scales appearing during exertion
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a well-defined structure
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Hexagonal crystal-like snowflake absorbed into his palm
Alger Wilson.source_notes: New details on his facial structure, muscularity, and the Church of Storms robe.

Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: Dress with frilly designs along the sleeves
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Swirling crimson star-like tattoo on the back of her hand that fades into skin
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Age confirmed by her 17th birthday dress mention; crimson star mark on hand confirmed.

Annie.primary_clothing: Traditional black Victorian maidservant dress with a crisp white apron and cap
Annie.face_description: Efficient and professional expression, tidy features, and a disciplined posture.
Annie.visual_anchor: Mid-30s female, fair skin, brown hair in a neat bun, wearing a black Victorian maidservant dress with a white apron.
Annie.source_notes: Audrey's maidservant; age and hair color inferred from her senior role.

Earl Hall.primary_clothing: Dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching trousers, dark brown hat
Earl Hall.face_description: Handsome features showing signs of age with wrinkles and a well-groomed mustache; blue eyes filled with joy.
Earl Hall.visual_anchor: Early 50s male, blue eyes, brown mustache, wearing a dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching hat, with a slightly widening waist.
Earl Hall.source_notes: Audrey's father; blue eyes, mustache, and clothing explicitly described.

Aguesid Negan.primary_clothing: Formal dark grey Victorian frock coat, high-collar white shirt, and silk cravat
Aguesid Negan.face_description: Slender face with a high forehead due to baldness; sharp, intelligent gaze.
Aguesid Negan.visual_anchor: 50s male, slender build, almost bald with a sharp gaze, wearing formal dark grey Victorian political attire.
Aguesid Negan.source_notes: Prime Minister of Loen; physical description confirmed in text.

Pallas Negan.primary_clothing: Elegant Victorian noble suit, deep blue velvet coat with gold embroidery
Pallas Negan.face_description: Dignified noble features with a strong jawline and authoritative presence.
Pallas Negan.visual_anchor: Middle-aged male noble, Duke of Negan, wearing elegant deep blue Victorian aristocratic clothing.
Pallas Negan.source_notes: Duke of Negan and brother to Aguesid Negan; mentioned as the main supporter of the Conservative Party.
